label: Columns
summary: Equal columns for badge walls and link farms. 4 → 2 → 1, 3 → 1, 2 → 1 as the screen shrinks.
era: The links-page table: rows of 88×31 buttons and blue underlines, cellpadding 4.

classes.name: rs-cols-2
classes.role: two equal columns from vga up

classes.name: rs-cols-3
classes.role: three equal columns from svga up

classes.name: rs-cols-4
classes.role: four from svga, two from vga, one below

a11y: None specific; column order is source order.
